text: Since I started this course it has helped me to change my thinking and the way I am trying to find the solution to improve the working enviroment of my working place and the people I am working with . I can rate this a a successfull course for any one . what I missed from this course is the interaction between the lecturer and the people who are learning the course . W e have missed the taste of coaching . Thank youGabriel Paul KissimaKaratu , Arusha , Tanzania
